python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
log_dir = Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs')
for name in ('mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out-0.log', 'mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out.log', 'mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-error-0.log', 'mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-error.log'):
    p = log_dir / name
    if not p.exists():
        continue
    print('--- ' + name + ' (last 25 lines) ---')
    lines = p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()
    print('lines=' + str(len(lines)))
    for line in lines[-25:]:
        print(line.encode('ascii', 'ignore').decode())
